The U.S. Preventive Services Task Force (Task Force) email list is open to all organizations and individuals who are interested in being informed of Task Force activities. Task Force email list subscribers receive:
Announcements on opportunities to provide public comment on draft materials 
Notifications of when final materials are posted or published 
Information about other Task Force activities 
To receive updates and announcements from the U.S. Preventive Services Task Force, visit the sign-up page .
The Agency for Healthcare Research and Quality (AHRQ) is mandated by the U.S. Congress to provide ongoing administrative, research, technical, and dissemination support to the Task Force. This support includes maintaining a subsc
